websocket_server(3) Library Functions Manual websocket_server(3)

NAME

websocket_server - WebSocket server state.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/network/websocket/server.h>

Data Fields


struct lws_context * context
libwebsockets context websocket_client_handler_fn handler
Client handler function. void * user_data
User data for handlers. atomic_t running
Server running flag. int port
Listening port. struct thread_pool * handler_pool
Thread pool for queueing handler work.

Detailed Description

WebSocket server state.
